spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Control Room Grid for dashboards.

cards.style: Glassmorphism with 1px border. backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800/50 hover:bg-slate-700/50 border border-slate-700 text-slate-200 px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-300 hover:text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-slate-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all

tables.container: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-md
tables.header: bg-slate-800/50 text-slate-300 text-sm font-medium border-b border-white/10

charts.guidelines: Use #6366F1 for primary metrics, #10B981 for revenue, #F43F5E for expenses. Tooltips must have glassmorphism background (#0B0F19/90) with border-white/10. Grid lines should be #1E293B. Hide axes lines.

login.layout: Split screen or centered glass card. Use animated mesh gradient in background.
login.visuals: Abstract dark slate indigo swirls image in background with bg-black/60 overlay to ensure contrast.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (1-3-4 columns). Top row: 4 KPI cards. Middle: Revenue vs Expense Chart (col-span-3) + Health Alerts (col-span-1). Bottom: Recent transactions table.
dashboard.kpi_cards: Must include value, trend (green/red indicator), and subtle sparkline.

transactions.layout: Full width table with sticky header. AI classify button prominent at top right.
transactions.features: Status badges for classification (e.g. 'AI Classified' - Indigo badge). Expense amounts in Rose, Income in Emerald.

journals.layout: Chronological list or table. Clear separation of Debits and Credits using alignment (Debits left, Credits slightly indented) and subtle color cues.

assets.layout: Grid of asset cards or dense table. Highlight depreciation values and net book value.

reconciliation.layout: Split-pane layout. Bank statement on left, Book on right. Interactive match buttons in between.

reports.layout: Swiss & High-Contrast density. Heavy use of IBM Plex Mono for figures to ensure vertical alignment of decimals.
reports.structure: Hierarchical tables with bold totals and overlines.

animations.micro_interactions: Hover states on all rows and cards. Subtle scale transformations.
animations.login_gradient: Slow pan of abstract background with pulsing indigo overlay.

login_background.description: A blue and black background with swirls, perfect for an animated login background.

glass_texture.description: An abstract dark blue textured background with blurred elements.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG standards against #0B0F19. Use text-slate-50 for high emphasis.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='upload-csv-btn', data-testid='ai-classify-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install and use 'recharts' for all financial charts (Revenue vs Expense, Cashflow, Asset Depreciation).
Use framer-motion for the animated gradient on the /login page.
Substitute the user-requested 'Inter' font with 'Work Sans' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text, as Inter is overused and banned by the E1 Persona.
Enforce glassmorphism using 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-white/10' for cards, sidebars, and sticky headers.
Format all currencies in INR (₹) using 'en-IN' locale string formatting.
Ensure the dashboard uses the 'Control Room Grid' strategy (tight gaps, fully utilized space).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) or generic Vercel styling. Stick strictly to the Slate/Indigo dark palette defined.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and major components for automated testing.
All monetary values should use tabular nums (e.g. tabular-nums utility in Tailwind) to align decimals perfectly in tables.
